senses.gloss: to alight and abode in a depressed tract or ground, in order that one’s place might not be known (like e. g. to avoid claims upon one’s hospitability)
deception, fraud, verbal noun of خَبَّ (ḵabba) (form I)

examples.text: لَا يَدْخُلُ الْجَنَّةَ خِبٌّ وَلَا مَنَّانٌ وَلَا بَخِيلٌ
examples.english: The cheater, the laudicenus and the miser don’t enter paradise.
